title: Upper Yard Battles Spread
description: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Nami, Narrator. Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is pre-gold- hunting dancing ritual----!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There is some food left. Want some?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Oooh!? Weird old man!! You're awake!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Thanks for earlier!! Come dance with us!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Yeah! Come dance, Knight of the Sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... I over- heard your conversations earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this island was originally called Jaya.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: For us, it will forever be

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that I would get her vearth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me!! Don't throw it away!!!

summary: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
